title: This Is Bad... They Just Shut Down FABLE 5
summary: Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models were shut down by US government order after a three-day public launch. The video discusses the implications of government intervention in frontier AI availability and raises concerns about whether powerful AI systems will remain accessible to the public.
writeup: The video reports that a US government order shut down Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models three days after their public launch. It examines what government intervention in the availability of frontier AI signals for the field. The central concern raised is whether powerful AI systems will stay accessible to the public, with the discussion touching on AI safety and human control.
